---
title: "Analysis of Variance"
description: "Basic theory and identification of ACF and PACF chart patterns, as well as ARIMA time series types."
notes: "Semester assignment"
img: "../assets/images/anova_asgn.jpg"
imgAlt: "Analysis of Variance Assignment Cover"
docPages: "53 pages"
year: "January, 2024"
previewText: "Preview"
codeText: "Code"
links:
  - url: https://app.box.com/s/mjryqjj9ibmrm9cp3kzvelf1f6fwn5kk
    icon: bi-binoculars
    text: Preview

format: html
order: 3
---
